docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM KRAMER-SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF RAY ANTHONY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIM CHENG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCES CHEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM:LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARMIENTO, RAY ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, JIM CHEN, FRANCES THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS NOT RETAINED IN BAD FAITH, AND DEFENDANT PROVED THE REASONABLENESS OF THE REPAIR QUANTUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
